system.description:
When you **_take your time and calmly line up the perfect shot_**, either deal your damage or roll +DEX: **on a 10+**, deal your damage and pick 2; **_on a 7-9_**, deal your damage and pick 1.

- Ignore armor or deal +1d4 damage (your call)
- Stun, hobble, or hinder them
- Make them trip or drop what they're holding
- Do no harm; don't deal your damage after all
